reasoning: President Trump passed the major tax legislation for the year—the 'One Big Beautiful Bill Act'—in July 2025. Multiple sources confirm that this bill did NOT change the top long-term capital gains tax rate, maintaining the status quo favorable rates without cutting them. While it adjusted the 0% bracket, the resolution criteria explicitly exclude adjustments to brackets and require a reduction for the highest bracket. Furthermore, the Polymarket prediction market was at just 1% on December 11, indicating practically zero expectation of late-breaking legislation. With the year effectively over and no new proposals pending, it's virtually certain that a capital gains tax cut will not happen in 2025.
